title: Forms and Input Types Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential input types and tags for creating user-friendly HTML forms.

questions.question: Which <input> type will automatically show a numeric keypad on a mobile device for entering phone numbers?
Which <input> type will open the system's native calendar/date picker widget?
What is the purpose of the <optgroup> tag within a <select> element?
options: To group related options together with a visible label.
To allow the user to select multiple options.
To encrypt the data sent by the form.
To link the dropdown to a separate CSS file.

questions.question: Which tag should you use for allowing the user to enter multiple lines of text, such as a message or a bio?
Which <input> type creates a slider widget for selecting a numerical value within a range?
